name: Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, salt, and pepper.
2. Pound the steak to an even thickness using a meat mallet or the flat side of a saucer.
3. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the onion and brown it for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the steak to the skillet and cook, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides.
6. Reduce the heat to low and cover the skillet.
7. Cook the steak slowly in the oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 1-1/2 hours, or until tender.
